message:
test(beads): add tests for escalation, rig, and synthesis field parsing (gt-klm1q)

Covers previously untested pure functions: FormatEscalationDescription,
ParseEscalationFields, bumpSeverity, FormatRigDescription, ParseRigFields,
RigBeadID, RigBeadIDWithPrefix, ParseSynthesisFields, FormatSynthesisFields,
parseIntField, and ParseAgentFieldsFromDescription. Adds round-trip tests
for all field types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
